item.title: Strawberry Music Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Strawberry Music Player [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: jonaski
item.itunes:summary:
Strawberry Music Player
(Audioplayers)
Strawberry is a music player and music collection organizer. It is a fork of Clementine released in 2018 aimed at music collectors and audiophiles. The name is inspired by the band Strawbs.

[read more]
item.description:
Strawberry Music Player
(Audioplayers)
Strawberry is a music player and music collection organizer. It is a fork of Clementine released in 2018 aimed at music collectors and audiophiles. The name is inspired by the band Strawbs.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Strawberry Music Player
(Audioplayers)
Strawberry is a music player and music collection organizer. It is a fork of Clementine released in 2018 aimed at music collectors and audiophiles. The name is inspired by the band Strawbs.

[read more]

item.title: Android Data Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Android Data Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Android Data Restore Program
(Utilities)
Most of the people come across the situation where they have lost their precious data stored on different Android devices. To protect or get back your important files against major electronic hazards you should choose perfect data recovery plan from right website. In this reference Android Data Restore Program supports fast and instant recovery of accidentally deleted digital media files like images, documents and video clips from all corrupted android based devices. Software uses in-depth scanning mechanism to search, find and restore missing files from Android tablet PC in few countable steps.

[read more]

item.title: Setup Creator Software [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Setup Creator Software [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: setupcreator
item.itunes:summary:
Setup Creator Software
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Advance executable Installer file maker software is helpful to provide facility to convert Microsoft Installer files into executable format in efficient manner. Download advance and innovative Setup Creator Software from company website www.setupcreator.com that helps to create a Setup wizard, ready for deployment, in few minutes. Safe and reliable setup generator application helps to create executable exe file with user defined company name, product name and product version in just few mouse clicks.

[read more]

item.title: USB Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
USB Restore Software
(Utilities)
USB Restore Software is created to lost and deleted data including pictures, snaps, and audio clips from accidentally formatted storage devices. Innovative pen drive recovery software enables you to retrieve all deleted important folders from damaged multimedia storage devices. Easy to handle key drive application is designed to regain all corrupted birthday photographs from virus attacked digital devices. Technical USB Memory Key utility provides all data recovery from various types of usb drive storage media. Easy to use usb key drive restores all corrupted video/ audio clips and other important documents that were lost due to virus attacked or formatted usb drives. Flash recovery program is developed to retrieve all lost unforgettable wedding snaps from accidentally damaged storage devices. USB restore software allows user to recover entire usb deleted data including pictures, songs files and other valuable documents. Reliable usb recovery program is used to rescue lost files from pen drive, memory cards and other all type os storage media. www.usbrestore.com provides technical and quick solution to recover lost and deleted folders from various usb drive storage media. USB flash memory drive software is developed to revive damaged cute baby photographs and other lost images from virus infected multimedia digital storage devices.Features:*USB restore utility enables user to access all lost valuable data from accidentally corrupted storage media. *Innovative pen drive restore software is created to retrieve missing and erased audio files from memory stick storage media.*Easy to use usb key drive application is developed to regain all fi

[read more]

Android Data Recover Software

item.title: Data Recovery Software for Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Software for Free [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Software for Free
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com provides reasonable priced Data Recovery Software for Free that offers you all technically advanced functionality to get back entire misplaced files or documents due to partitioning error, worm attack, power failure, human error, logical crash in disk, accidentally deletion, reformat of memory card, software error, damaged of hard disk, improper system shutdown or pen drive is pulled out suddenly while operating with device with your minimal time and efforts. Fully featured data restoration utility allows user to rescue permanently deleted database records, files, pictures, audio, video files and memorable snaps from damaged data storage device or corrupted flash media without affecting the originality of data. Comprehensive Data Recovery Software for Free offers affordable way to instantly regain permanently lost digital pictures and data in smaller amount of time. Outstanding Data Recovery Software for Free recaptures virus infected or damaged files having different formats like mp3, mp4, zip, txt, html, xls, jpg, jpeg, tiff, bmp, bitmap and many more in most affordable and convenient way without doing much efforts. Most innovative data retrieval program assists user in getting back their lost personal folders from all capacity storage media easily. Advanced Data Recovery Software for Free is designed with real time GUI environment that facilitates all category of users like technical, non technical, home user, novice user, end user or others to make fully utilization of its functions without facing any kind of p[problem or taking any special training. Professional data rescue utility rapidly restores entire corrupted files and folders due to worm attack or hard disk failure. Features:* Well functional Data Recovery Software for Free empowers you to salvage lost data as it is.* Data Recovery Software does not require any expert guidance to use it.* Data restoration program successfully runs on all major Windows operating system.

[read more]

Data Recovery Software for Free

item.title: MSI to EXE Converter Software [File Management]
item.itunes:title: MSI to EXE Converter Software [File Management]
item.itunes:author: setupcreator
item.itunes:summary:
MSI to EXE Converter Software
(File Management)
MSI to exe installer setup package builder utility create executable .EXE files from Microsoft Installer.MSI format. Totally professional and easy to use setup creator build exe installation package from Windows installer MSI format with fully customized user friendly GUI interface. Setup creator tool generate executable (.exe) files by using the original Microsoft installer (.MSI) files format. MSI to exe converter application tool provide facility to save convert exe at user specified location. EXE installation setup converter program create and maintain the originality of MSI package even after the conversion into exe setup package using .NET framework installer. MSI to EXE setup creator program do not require any prior technical knowledge. The exe setup maker application also provides facility to convert default Microsoft Visual Studio.NET framework MSI installation setup packages to equivalent and similar exe installer format. MSI installer to exe installation setup converter is powerful, reliable, and cost effective solution to create executable file form Windows installer MSI file format. MSI to exe installer package builder software support to different versions of Windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Features: * Easily convert Windows installer file to executable file format. * Setup converter utility helps you to build exe files using MSI installation setup wizard. * Easy and user friendly single click MSI to EXE setup creator program and do not require any prior technical knowledge. * MSI to exe setup maker is a professional solution to converting Window installer to exe setup package. * Facility to save the convert exe file at user specified location. * Original .MSI file format, functionality and structure of your application remains unchanged.

[read more]

item.title: 90 Fps unlocker Module [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]

item.itunes:author: ankan005
item.itunes:summary:
90 Fps unlocker Module
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
It's a magisk module to unlock 90 fps. It support various games.
Well there are many module present at a time but trust me try this one , this will give you good hardcore performance.
